title: Parent Phase C5 — Track C End-to-End
execution_plan_ref: docs/platform/EXECUTION_PLAN.md - M365 CPS Track C P5

principles: Tool-first determinism (capability surface must equal advertised surface)
Operator observability (the system must explain its own state)
Plan-first execution with strict per-phase gates
anti_alignment: Mutation fence on actual write actions stays on
Risk-tier classification per agent stays unchanged
Two-phase confirmation gate for high-risk mutations stays on

user_stated_requirements: Live e2e of planned vs implemented action behavior; docstring linter green; governance closure.
intent_capture.intent_verification: Tasks T1..T5 together satisfy this parent phase's objective.

objective: Live e2e of planned vs implemented action behavior; docstring linter green; governance closure.
current_state: Parent phase scope draft; no implementation yet.
target_state: All child tasks complete; GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkC.

in_scope: E2E: invoke planned action returns not_yet_implemented
E2E: invoke implemented action returns success
file_denylist: Any file not in allowlist of the active child-phase task

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R6; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R7; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R8; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

tasks.name: E2E: invoke planned action returns not_yet_implemented
tasks.description: Live test: pick a known planned action; call via UCP; assert status_class == 'not_yet_implemented'.

tasks.name: E2E: invoke implemented action returns success
tasks.description: Live test on an implemented action; assert success.

tasks.name: E2E: docstrings match registry
tasks.description: Run docstring linter against current registry state; assert no drift.

tasks.name: Update CHANGELOG / EXECUTION_PLAN / ACTION_LOG
tasks.validation_command: cd $UCP_ROOT && git diff --stat docs/platform/EXECUTION_PLAN.md && cd $M365_ROOT && git diff --stat Operations/EXECUTION_PLAN.md

checks.name: Parent phase C5 integration
checks.description: All child tasks T1..T5 green; integration test pass

no_go_triggers: Any child task fails its validation_command

agent_constraints: Do not touch files outside Section 5 file allowlist.
Do not skip or reorder tasks (Section 7 strict ordering).
Do not modify thresholds or invariants to make gates green without owner approval.
Do not execute until plan status is approved.
Reference plan:{plan-id}:{task-id} in all action log entries and commits.
Do not add tasks, gates, or deliverables not in this plan without owner approval.
Call validate_action MCP tool before any write operation (UCP server).
Each child phase commits locally; no push until parent-phase GATE is green.
Each parent-phase GATE pushes to feat/m365-cps-trk{X} branch only.
Each track GATE merges to development (UCP) and main (M365) only after live tenant smoke green.
